security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Cross-platform steganography toolkit: hide encrypted messages inside images and audio.
bundle.longDescription: Stegcore hides encrypted messages inside ordinary images and audio files. The output looks and sounds completely normal. Three authenticated ciphers (Ascon-128, ChaCha20-Poly1305, AES-256-GCM), Argon2id key derivation, deniable dual-payload mode, and a built-in steganalysis suite at Aletheia parity on the classical SPA / RS / WS detectors. Offline by design: no telemetry, no accounts, no network connections.
